summary: Completed testing for Iteration 32 - DWZ Creation Modal from 1688 Orders. Backend tests: 8/8 passed. Frontend: Page loads correctly, modal code is properly implemented with all required data-testid attributes. Cannot fully test modal interaction because 1688 API token is expired (401 error) - no orders load to click 'Create DWZ' button.
critical_code_review_comments: DWZ Creation Modal is properly implemented in Trade1688Dashboard.jsx (lines 760-897)

All required data-testid attributes are present: dwz-create-dialog, dwz-company-prefix, dwz-destination, dwz-shopify-order, dwz-shopify-color, dwz-shopify-size, dwz-configured-remark, dwz-cancel-btn, dwz-create-btn
Modal opens via openDwzDialog function (line 436) when 'Create DWZ' button is clicked on order card
Form state management is correct with dwzFormData state object
Backend endpoint /api/1688/create-dwz-from-1688 accepts all required fields: order_id, company_prefix, destination, shopify_order_number, shopify_color, shopify_size, configured_remark
Backend properly validates required field (order_id) and returns 422 for missing fields
Destination dropdown has correct options: IN (India), PK (Pakistan), BD (Bangladesh), LK (Sri Lanka)

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Page loads, modal code verified, but cannot test modal interaction due to 1688 token expiration

seed_data_creation: None - 1688 orders cannot be loaded due to expired token
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 tested DWZ Creation Modal feature. The 1688 Trade Center page (/1688-trade-center or /1688-trade) loads correctly but shows 'Failed to Load Orders' with 401 error because the 1688 API token has expired. The modal code is properly implemented with all required fields and data-testid attributes. To fully test the modal interaction, the 1688 API token needs to be refreshed. Backend endpoint /api/1688/create-dwz-from-1688 is working correctly.

backend_endpoint_structure.Endpoint accepts all fields: PASS - company_prefix, destination, shopify_order_number, shopify_color, shopify_size, configured_remark
backend_endpoint_structure.Destination options accepted: PASS - IN, PK, BD, LK all accepted

known_limitations.1688_api_token_expired: The 1688 API token has expired, causing 401 errors when loading orders. This prevents testing the full modal interaction flow (clicking 'Create DWZ' button on an order card).
known_limitations.modal_not_testable_without_orders: The DWZ modal only renders when an order is selected. Without loaded orders, the modal cannot be opened via UI interaction.

mocked_apis.note: 1688 external API fails due to token expiration (401 Unauthorized)
